---
title: "zealhmm"
subtitle: "Teosinte-introgression QTL recovery under low-coverage genotyping"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: zeal
    contents:
      - analysis/zeal-*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", subtitle: "Description"}
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  - id: teonam
    contents:
      - analysis/teonam-*.qmd
      - analysis/marker-thinning.qmd
      - analysis/callers-and-methods.qmd
      - analysis/simulation-calibration.qmd
      - analysis/source-method-comparison.qmd
      - analysis/b1-mapping-benchmark.qmd
      - analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.qmd
      - analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, subtitle, date]
    field-display-names: {title: "Notebook", subtitle: "Description"}
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

## ZEAL / BZea

B73 × teosinte BC2S3 NILs · SNP50K.

::: {#zeal}
:::

## TeoNAM

W22 × 5 teosinte inbreds, BC1S4 RILs · Chen 2019.

::: {#teonam}
:::
